description: Create a multi-file Talon snippet module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\code_snippets\ that maps voice commands to code template insertions for Python, JavaScript, and HTML. The module must include a snippets.talon-list file defining the user.code_snippet list with mappings for 'python class' (python_class), 'python function' (python_function), 'python try except' (python_try_except), 'javascript function' (javascript_function), 'javascript arrow' (javascript_arrow), 'javascript promise' (javascript_promise), 'html table' (html_table), 'html form' (html_form), and 'html boilerplate' (html_boilerplate). A snippets.py file must register this list, define a dictionary mapping these identifiers to realistic, syntactically valid code templates (no placeholders), and implement a user.insert_snippet(name: str) action. A snippets.talon file must implement the command snippet {user.code_snippet}: to call the insertion action and a snippet list: command to print available snippets.
